creator: discipline@tiscali.it
text:
To upgrade to r13668 I had to force-remove devel/xxhash and reinstall it later.
Later the ports has been updated to r13683 and I successfully upgraded it without the need to remove/reinstall devel/xxhash again.
I don't know if between the to versions something has been done to solve the problem I have encountered (it seems I can't find relevant changes though), but I think that, in any case, this PR could be closed.
